title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at VRL Logistics

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at VRL Logistics
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at VRL Logistics. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About VRL Logistics:
VRL Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VRL Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
